---
title: "How to Generate Load Profiles with ResStock and ComStock"
description: "blog post description"
author:
  - name: Stella Symonds
    url: https://stellassymonds.github.io/
    affiliation: Programs Associate @ the Clean Coalition 
    affiliation-url: https://clean-coalition.org/stella-symonds/
date: 05-30-2026
citation:
  url: https://stellassymonds.github.io/posts/2026-05-30-resstock-article/
image: resstock.png 
draft: false
---

Here is where I will start writing my actual blog post content.
